name: Android-Disassembler
description: Disassemble ANY files including .so (NDK, JNI), Windows PE(EXE, DLL, SYS, etc), linux binaries,  libraries, and any other files such as pictures, audios, etc(for fun)files on Android. Capstone-based disassembler application on android. 안드로이드 NDK 공유 라이브러리, Windows 바이너리, etc,... 리버싱 앱
